message:
feat(gateway): add private overlay service for manifest overrides (bd-2n73.13)

Public-side infrastructure for private repo integration:
- FLYWHEEL_PRIVATE_DIR env var for overlay directory resolution
- Overlay manifest loading/merging (enable/disable tools, override fields)
- Environment-specific tool configuration (staging/production)
- Tool secret resolution via TOOL_<NAME>_API_KEY convention + explicit mapping
- Config value resolution via env-mapping.yaml
- Graceful no-op when private dir is absent

32 tests covering loading, merging, env mapping, and edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
